title: Second-Year Bulgarian
catalogDescription: Continuation of BULGR 401, BULGR 402, BULGR 403. Selected readings in Bulgarian literature, history, and culture. Reinforces and extends basic knowledge of Bulgarian grammar and vocabulary. Third in a sequence of three. Prerequisite: BULGR 405. Offered: Sp.
prerequisiteNotes: prerequisite text is preserved as a note until a parser can safely normalize AND/OR/minimum-grade semantics into graph prerequisites.
